name: Claiborne Avenue Overpass — Informal Supply Staging Area
description: The underside of the Claiborne Avenue overpass, where the elevated roadway provides a dry platform above the flood plane. Two additional pharmaceutical crates are stacked here, covered with a blue tarpaulin, undisclosed to any official relief inventory.
atmosphericDetails: The tarpaulin is weighed down with a concrete block — someone placed it deliberately, not hastily
A handwritten inventory list is taped to the inside of the nearest crate's lid, in Father Clement's recognizable block lettering
The sound of water moving against the overpass supports below — steady, indifferent
